title: bridge-matrix: SentIds::persist_to_file blocks the async task on every outbound message
description: bridge.rs:308 calls sent_ids.persist_to_file() synchronously on every Matrix→nie message. persist_to_file does fs::write + fs::rename. These are blocking syscalls inside a tokio async task. On a slow filesystem (NFS, full disk), this blocks the task's thread and stalls all event processing for the bridge, including nie deliver notifications. Scenario: bridge deployed with keyfile on NFS or slow disk; under load, outbound messages stall the event loop.
